/usr/bin/arm-none-eabi-g++ -mcpu=cortex-m4 -std=gnu++14 -g3 -DDEBUG -O0 -ffunction-sections -fdata-sections -fno-exceptions -fno-rtti -fno-use-cxa-atexit -Wall -fstack-usage -fcyclomatic-complexity -MMD -MP --specs=nano.specs -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -mthumb -T/home/matan/fw_workspace/fw-general-purpose-controller/bootloader_projects/bootloader_g474/STM32G474CETX_FLASH.ld -Wl,-Map=fw-bootloader-g4.map -Wl,--gc-sections -static -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16 -mfloat-abi=hard -mthumb -Wl,--start-group -lc -lm -lstdc++ -lsupc++ -Wl,--end-group
